name: Dispatch
_format_note: Cover-only image generation. 4 creative pathways: name-archaeology, experience-capture, symbol-literalization, product-elevation. Phase 2A: cover only.

color_system._philosophy: Pre-determined color derivation from brand hex + pathway. All Dispatch lives in darkness — no pathway produces a light seed color.

pathways.name_archaeology: Historical illustration, oval vignette, monochromatic brand hue
pathways.experience_capture: First-person photography, practical light only, silhouette human presence
pathways.symbol_literalization: Logo subject as living creature, near-silhouette, chiaroscuro
pathways.product_elevation: Studio product photography, black void, single key light
